name_en: Top-tier original factory, comes with full set
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, comes with full set
Raw photos of nude pink bulk stock!!️
Lady's latest micro series, too small to hold much, can only fit a cute little bag 😘, made from soft lambskin, iconic letter hardware, exquisite shape 👏🏻, simple, stylish and versatile, small capacity, fits lipstick and car keys, can also be used as a card holder 🤗
size:12*10*5cm
